spirit.name: Haru
spirit.title: The Waker of Seeds
spirit.dialogue_intro: Oh! A floating farm... I haven't seen one of those in a long, long time. Welcome, wanderer. My name is Haru.
spirit.dialogue_quest_given: My meadow is tired. It needs 6 Clover to bloom again. Will you grow them for me?
spirit.dialogue_partial_deliver: These are lovely. Keep going — the meadow can feel them already.
spirit.dialogue_complete: The meadow is singing! You may take some Moonbloom seeds as thanks. May the wind carry you somewhere beautiful.
spirit.dialogue_leave_incomplete: Oh... I understand. The wind is calling you. Come back someday.

spirit.name: Natsu
spirit.title: The Keeper of Brilliant Things
spirit.dialogue_intro: AHAHA! A FARM! FLOATING! Right here! This is the most wonderful thing I have seen all season, and I have seen MANY wonderful things.
spirit.dialogue_quest_given: My festival is almost here and I need something golden. Bring me 4 Sunflowers and 2 Moonblooms. BIG ones, yes? Well, any size.
spirit.dialogue_partial_deliver: Yes, yes! More, more! The festival drums are already beating!
spirit.dialogue_complete: PERFECT! The festival can begin! Here — Amber Wheat seeds. A gift from the sun itself. Well. From me. Same thing.
spirit.dialogue_leave_incomplete: Ah... the festival will be a little quieter this year. Come back before next summer, yes? The drums will still be waiting.

spirit.name: Aki
spirit.title: The Keeper of What Remains
spirit.dialogue_intro:
...You came.
The wind doesn't bring visitors very often anymore.
spirit.dialogue_quest_given: The harvest was... thin this year. If you could bring me 8 Wheat — or some Amber if you've found it — I could put the field to rest properly.
spirit.dialogue_complete:
...Thank you.
The field is resting now. Here. Frostbell seeds. For the winter ahead.
spirit.dialogue_leave_incomplete:
...
It's all right.
The field understands.

spirit.name: Fuyu
spirit.title: The One Who Remembers
spirit.dialogue_intro:
I have been waiting a very long time.
I am glad you found me before the cold grew too deep.
spirit.dialogue_quest_given: There is one thing I need before I can let the world remember spring again. Can you bring me 4 Snowdrops? Something that survives the cold, to prove life persists.
spirit.dialogue_partial_deliver: They're beautiful. Each one that survives the frost is a small miracle.
spirit.dialogue_complete:
...Yes.
It is enough. The world remembers now.

You may go home, wanderer.
The seasons will find their way back.
spirit.dialogue_leave_incomplete:
The cold will hold a little longer.
But you will return.
I have always known you would return.
